response: Fallujah and Dying Fetus share a common artistic endeavor of technical death metal, as Fallujah is an American technical death metal band from San Francisco, California, founded in 2007, and Dying Fetus is an American death metal band known for their consistently hook-laden song structures, complex riffing, and political/modern themes. Both bands are part of the death metal genre and have toured with notable acts, reflecting their shared musical style and artistic direction.
